arguments.name: There are no inputs for this command.

examples:
Command Example
!beyondtrust-get-managed-systems
Human Readable Output
BeyondTrust Managed Accounts
ManagedAssetID
ChangeFrequencyDays
AssetID
AssetName

!beyondtrust-get-managed-systems
Human Readable Output
BeyondTrust Managed Accounts
ManagedAssetID
ChangeFrequencyDays
AssetID
AssetName
PlatformID
name: beyondtrust-get-managed-systems

outputs.description: The port used to connect to the host. If null and the related Platform.PortFlag is true, Password Safe uses Platform.DefaultPort for communication. BeyondTrust.System.Timeout Connection timeout – Length of time in seconds before a slow or unresponsive connection to the system fails.
outputs.name: BeyondTrust.System.Port

outputs.description: True to queue a password change when scheduled password test fails, otherwise false. BeyondTrust.System.ChangeFrequencyDays When ChangeFrequencyType is “xdays”, the frequency with which the password changes (between 1-90 days).
outputs.name: BeyondTrust.System.ResetPasswordOnMismatchFlag

outputs.description: Default Information Systems Administrator (ISA) release duration. BeyondTrust.System.FunctionalAccountID ID of the functional account used for local Managed Account password changes.
outputs.name: BeyondTrust.System.ISAReleaseDuration

outputs.description: The change frequency for scheduled password changes: "first"– Changes are scheduled for the first day of the month; "last"– Changes are scheduled for the last day of the month; "xdays"– Changes are scheduled every "x" days (see ChangeFrequencyDays) BeyondTrust.System.DirectoryID ID of the directory. Is set if the Managed System is a Directory.
outputs.name: BeyondTrust.System.ChangeFrequencyType

outputs.description: ID of the Managed System. BeyondTrust.System.AssetID ID of the asset. Is set if the Managed System is an Asset or a Database.
outputs.name: BeyondTrust.System.ManagedAssetID

outputs.description: ID of the Managed System Platform. BeyondTrust.System.ElevationCommand Elevation command to use (sudo, pbrun, or pmrun).
outputs.name: BeyondTrust.System.PlatformID

outputs.description: True to enable password testing, otherwise false. BeyondTrust.System.CloudID ID of the Cloud System. Is set if the Managed System is a Cloud System.
outputs.name: BeyondTrust.System.CheckPasswordFlag

outputs.description: ID of the default DSS Key Rule assigned to Managed Accounts that were created under this Managed System. BeyondTrust.System.PasswordRuleID ID of the default Password Rule assigned to Managed Accounts that were created under this Managed System.
outputs.name: BeyondTrust.System.DSSKeyRuleID

outputs.description: Domain NetBIOS name. Setting this value will allow Password Safe to fall back to the NetBIOS name, if needed. BeyondTrust.System.DatabaseID ID of the database. Is set if the Managed System is a Database.
outputs.name: BeyondTrust.System.NetBiosName

outputs.description: Default maximum release duration. BeyondTrust.System.ChangePasswordAfterAnyReleaseFlag True to change passwords on release of a request, otherwise false.
outputs.name: BeyondTrust.System.MaxReleaseDuration

outputs.description: Name of the related entity (Asset, Directory, Database, or Cloud). BeyondTrust.System.ReleaseDuration Default release duration.
outputs.name: BeyondTrust.System.SystemName

outputs.description: Email address of the user that manages the system. BeyondTrust.System.Description The description of the system.
outputs.name: BeyondTrust.System.ContactEmail

outputs.description: Time (UTC) that password changes are scheduled to occur. BeyondTrust.System.AutoManagementFlag True if password auto-management is enabled, otherwise false.
outputs.name: BeyondTrust.System.ChangeTime

outputs.description: ID of the Functional Account used for SSH session logins.
outputs.name: BeyondTrust.System.LoginAccountID
